name: Mysore Palace
description: Grand royal palace known for Indo-Saracenic architecture and illuminated evenings.

name: Chamundi Hill
description: Scenic hill viewpoint above Mysore with temple access and city views.

name: Sri Chamundeshwari Temple
description: Important temple on Chamundi Hill dedicated to Goddess Chamundeshwari.

name: Brindavan Gardens
description: Terraced garden near KRS Dam known for fountains and evening lighting.

name: St. Philomena's Cathedral
description: Gothic-style cathedral and one of Mysore's most recognizable landmarks.

name: Jaganmohan Palace
description: Former royal palace that houses an art gallery and cultural exhibits.

name: Karanji Lake
description: Quiet lake and nature park with a walk-through aviary and boating options.

name: Mysore Zoo
description: Well-known zoological garden suitable for families and slower sightseeing.

name: Devaraja Market
description: Traditional market for flowers, spices, produce, and local shopping.

name: Rail Museum Mysore
description: Rail heritage museum with vintage locomotives and family-friendly exhibits.
